drafts.draft: Built an AI agent for an electrician. Day 3, a customer asked about boilers. We dont do boilers. The agent confidently quoted £4500 to install a Worcester. Now I gate every quote behind a human.
drafts.reason: Concrete failure-mode story. Hooks anyone shipping production agents.

drafts.draft: Smallest win for a small business AI agent: ask the owner the 5 questions they answer most this month. Hardcode those 5. The model handles the rest. Most builders skip this because it isnt glamorous.
drafts.reason: Practical SMB advice. Mild contrarian against pure-LLM purists.

drafts.draft: WhatsApp AI for a hair salon: 60 percent of inbound is rebooks. Train on the rebook flow first. The other 40 percent is just edge cases pretending to be hard.
drafts.reason: Specific industry insight with concrete percentages. SMB-targeted.

drafts.target_text: I think sociopaths are particularly attracted to stoicism because they dont feel emotions
drafts.draft: Or stoicism is the only philosophy that pretends an emotion you cant control should be ignored. Anyone who feels deeply knows thats impossible. Whats the closest stoic idea you actually use?
drafts.reason: Mild contrarian + question to author. levelsio engages on philosophy threads.

drafts.target_text: Sauna is a skin cheat code. My protocol: 20 min sauna at 210, 3 min cold plunge, face routine.
drafts.draft: How long before the cold plunge stops feeling like punishment? Mine took about 4 weeks of doing it daily before the post-plunge euphoria kicked in. Curious if its similar for most people.
drafts.reason: Personal anecdote + direct question. Largest target today (1.16M).

drafts.target_text: Were sharing the research agenda of The Anthropic Institute (TAI). 4 areas: economic diffusion, threats and resilience, AI systems in the wild, AI-driven R&D
drafts.draft: Glad economic diffusion is on the list. Most SMB owners I work with still think AI is for tech companies. Whats the early signal you think will be hardest to read accurately at this stage?
drafts.reason: On-topic SMB framing on Anthropic post. Brand-relevant target. Posted 0h ago.

drafts.target_text: My favorite tax planning moves that most high income DIYers are missing: 1. S Corp 2. Solo 401k
drafts.draft: How early in the year do you actually run the S Corp election math? Once a year in December feels like the obvious answer but Ive seen people miss the boat by waiting until tax filing.
drafts.reason: Specific tax timing question. TKopelman replies frequently.

drafts.target_text: Apple announced it will let users choose their AI model inside iOS 27. Not Apple Intelligence only. A model picker.
drafts.draft: A model picker on iOS is the closest Apple has come to admitting it lost the AI race. The interesting bit is which model becomes default. Default is 80 percent of share. Whats your prediction?
drafts.reason: Sharper take + prediction question. Algo-strong: opinion-bait.

drafts.target_text: Anthropic bans xAI from using Claude... xAI gives every Claude user $4k credits...
drafts.draft: The xAI loophole is hilarious. The same week Cluely got banned, every cracked-engineer-with-a-resume hopped on the affiliate program. The real ban Anthropic should write next is on Distillers Inc.
drafts.reason: Light humour + builds on Gergelys take. He engages on AI-industry threads.

drafts.target_text: Looking at the texts between Mira Murati and Sam Altman from the OpenAI trial: the only adult in the room was Mira
drafts.draft: Mira reads as the only one with a clear sense of which fights are worth having. The wild part is that Sam keeps replying as if he hasnt read his own previous message. Whats your read on the timeline?
drafts.reason: Substantive read on the released texts. Direct question.

drafts.target_text: congrats to @mattpocockuk for crossing 1m views across his two sessions in <2 weeks
drafts.draft: Whats matt doing in the talks that other instructors arent? Hard to imagine pure topic-pick alone gets to 1m in 2 weeks, theres usually a delivery move under it.
drafts.reason: Asks swyx for the actual mechanism, not the outcome. swyx replies to craft questions.

drafts.target_text: Your product is ready. What are you fixing first? - onboarding - pricing - distribution - retention
drafts.draft: Distribution. The other three you can keep iterating after launch. Distribution decides whether anyone notices the iteration. Whats your default channel right now?
drafts.reason: Strong opinion + question to author. TTrimoreau replies to engaged answers.
